name: Follow Up Boss Real Estate CRM API
what_it_does: Follow Up Boss REST API for real estate team CRM, lead routing, and agent productivity management. Enables AI agents to manage real estate lead capture and routing from portals (Zillow, Realtor.com, Homes.com) for automated lead distribution, handle contact and client management for buyer and seller relationship lifecycle, access automated follow-up sequence and drip campaign management for lead nurture automation, retrieve call log and SMS communication tracking for agent activity monitoring, manage transaction and deal pipeline tracking for real estate business management, handle team and agent management for real estate team operations, access showing and appointment scheduling for buyer agent workflow, retrieve reporting and leaderboard for agent performance management, manage integration with MLS, showing software, and real estate marketing platforms, and automate lead response and speed-to-lead compliance for real estate team standards.
use_cases: Routing real estate leads from portal integration agents
Automating lead nurture from real estate marketing agents
Tracking agent activity from team management agents
Managing transaction pipelines from real estate operations agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without residential team focus
Property management without real estate sales CRM needs
Individual agents without team lead routing requirements
best_when: A real estate team or brokerage using Follow Up Boss wants AI agents to automate lead routing, follow-up sequences, agent activity tracking, and transaction pipeline management.
avoid_when: NAR SETTLEMENT RISK: Post-2024 NAR settlement changes buyer agent compensation disclosure requirements — automated buyer lead intake must capture and present buyer agency compensation disclosures per new MLS rules. RESPA Section 8 prohibits referral fee arrangements with lead sources; automated lead routing with financial kickbacks creates RESPA violation risk. TCPA compliance — automated SMS and phone follow-up sequences require prior express written consent; mass SMS blasts to real estate leads without consent create TCPA class action exposure.

auth.notes: Follow Up Boss uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Documentation at docs.followupboss.com. Webhooks for CRM events. Austin, Texas HQ. Founded 2011. Zillow Group acquired Follow Up Boss (2023). 50,000+ real estate agent users. Strong in real estate team CRM. Competes with kvCORE, Sierra Interactive, and LionDesk for real estate CRM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly subscription; team and enterprise plans
pricing.notes: Austin, TX. Founded 2011. Zillow Group acquired 2023. 50,000+ agent users. Real estate team CRM leader. Competes with kvCORE and Sierra Interactive for team CRM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API docs

known_agent_gotchas: NAR SETTLEMENT COMPLIANCE: Post-2024 NAR settlement changes buyer agent compensation disclosure; automated buyer lead intake must present required MLS compensation disclosures per new rules effective August 2024
TCPA SMS compliance — automated SMS follow-up sequences to real estate leads require prior express written consent; mass unsolicited SMS creates TCPA class action exposure (up to $1,500/message)

RESPA referral fee prohibition — automated lead routing with financial arrangements between lead sources and agents creates RESPA Section 8 kickback liability; lead routing must be based on merit, not financial exchange
Zillow ownership conflict — Zillow acquired Follow Up Boss 2023; automated integration with competing lead portals (Realtor.com, Homes.com) may face platform restrictions or data use policy changes

Speed-to-lead automation — automated lead response time tracking creates team performance accountability; agents who miss response time thresholds need human escalation workflow, not automated reassignment without notice
MLS data terms — real estate contact data derived from MLS systems has restrictive use terms; automated enrichment or sharing of MLS-sourced data must comply with MLS data use agreements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Real estate team CRM. SOC2. API key auth. US. Lead, contact, and transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real estate CRM. SOC2. API key. US. Lead and contact data.
